calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Yu Jiang Zhang and Guang Hong Zhang; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Charles Zhang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor 1. from Yong Shi Zhang, aka YongShi Zhang to Michelle Yongshi Zhang. Minor 2. Yong Qizhang, aka Yongqi Zhang to Victoria Yongqi Cheung. The court also grants the name change of mother/petitioner Guang Hong Zhang, aka Guanghong Zhang to Joyce Guanghong Cheung.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
